content:
SUPER BIO-ORGANIC
Rich in Phytonutrients, High Fiber Detoxification

SUPER BIO-ORGANIC is quality golden grain husk plus a special blend of more than 30 types of organic seeds, vegetables and green foods that work synergistically to provide optimum nutritional values to our body. It is a superior health food that provides balance nutrition, enhances immunity system and eliminates internal toxins from the body.

Modern lifestyles and diet cause the built up of mucoid plaque. This blockage causes toxins to build up, leading to a host of health problems. Many degenerative diseases such as high cholesterol, atherosclerosis, cardio vascular problem, immune disorder, etc. are caused by mucoid plaque. Besides, poor skin complexion, pimples and lethargy also caused by accumulation of toxins.

Super Bio-Organic is rich in pollution free organic seeds which is known for its high "adhesive power" to remove internal body toxins and unwanted wastes.

Benefits of Super Bio-Organic:

- Natural constipation remedy
- Balance nutrients for total well-being
- Remove body toxins
- Prevent and reduce symptoms of hemorrhoid
- Improve digestion
- Provide relief from irritable bowel syndrome
- Manage body weight
- Improve cardiovascular health

Ingredients:

Golden Grain Husk, Crimson Lentils, White Wheat, Red Lentils, Black Beluga Lentils, Gold Lentils, Red Grains, Red Wheat, Green Lentils, Coicis Seeds, Spinach, Mushroom, Peanuts, Carrots, Black Sesame, Pumpkin Seeds, Celery, Lotus Seeds, Oats, Pine Seeds, Lotus Root Powder, Flax Seeds, Soya Beans, Wild Rice, Yam, Gingko, Wheat Germ, Alfalfa, Fennel Seeds, Asparagus, Artichoke, Spirulina, Chlorella, Wheat Grass, Barley Grass and Japanese Green Tea, Fructo-Oligosaccharide (FOS), Enzymes (Papain & Bromelain) and Mulberry Chlorophyll.

SUPER BIO-ORGANIC pollution-free organic ingredients are certified by Organic Crop Improvement Association International (OCIA) and imported from Canada.

Nutritional Facts (per 100g):

- Energy: 385 kcal
- Fat: 0.7g
- Trans Fatty Acid: 0.0g
- Cholesterol: 0.0mg
- Sodium: 51.4mg
- Total Carbohydrate: 89.1g
- Total Dietary Fibre: 27.2g
- Monounsaturated Fat: 0.1g
- Polyunsaturated Fat: 0.0g
- Protein: 5.6g
- Calcium: 148.7mg
- Iron: 9.0mg
- Potassium: 335.7mg

Suggested Serving:

Add 1-2 scoops of SUPER BIO-ORGANIC powder with 350ml of luke warm water (below 35°C) or other beverages. Stir well and drink immediately. For better result, please take 1/2 hour before meal and drink an additional glass of water for maximum effectiveness. Children under 6 years may take half portion.

Suggestions:

1. Removal of mucoid plaque and body detoxification: three times daily, consume 1/2 hour before breakfast, lunch and dinner.

2. General health maintenance: twice daily, consume 1/2 hour before breakfast and dinner.

3. Meal replacement: three times daily or consume when necessary. For slimming purpose, replace it with one or two meals to lose unwanted weight quickly while maintaining optimum nutrition.

Stages of Body Response:

Stage 1 after consumption (3–8 days): Large quantities of darkescent, frequent, pungent odour - Remove the accumulated foams and wastes from the digestive system

Stage 2 after consumption (6–45 days): Forests foams to top of water - Toxins have been gradually cleared, digestive system is adjusting

Stage 3 after consumption (45 days): Normal bowel movements - Body systems are balanced and toxins eliminated

Managing Healing Reactions:

- Heavy feeling of stomach and frequent burping: Normal adjustment reaction, continue use
- Sleeplessness at night: Natural recovery process, continue before bedtime
- Increase in menstrual flow: Detoxification effect, will normalize over time
- Body aches: Normal reaction for acidic/weak body types
- Itch or rashes: Detoxification effect, normally affects those with weak liver
- No significant reaction: Body health is excellent, or body is adjusting - continue use
